/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-cast-qual -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g -DUNIV_DEBUG -Wl,--export-dynamic -rdynamic  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/zlob0int-t.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/zlob0int.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/mtr0log.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/ut0dbg.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/lot0buf.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/fil0fil.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/fut0lst.cc.o CMakeFiles/zlob0int-t.dir/lot0dat.cc.o -o ../../../../runtime_output_directory/zlob0int-t  -laio ../../../../libgmock.a ../../../../libgtest.a ../../libgunit_small.a ../../../../libgmock.a ../../../../libgtest.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
